Previous page Ready to use No mixing, no measuring, no mess! This organic formula can be applied straight from the bottle. For indoor and outdoor use Small but mighty, this pump can be used indoor or out, giving you healthier and happier plants. Easy to use Lightweight design makes it easy to reach plants in small spaces and just 1 pump of food is needed. Pet and child friendly Suitable for use as directed in areas where children and pets have access. Next page 1 Ready To Use 2 For Indoors & Outdoors 3 Easy To Use 4 Pet & Child Friendly No mixing, no mess - simply grow your plants twice as big organically No mixing, no measuring, no mess. Just one pump of Miracle-Gro Organic Pump & Feed Food For All Plants will feed your plant for a week with glorious results, organically. For use on all plants indoors or outdoors, Miracle-Gro Organic Pump & Feed Food For All Plants is suited to the needs of all organic growers and particularly effective for plants in small spaces. Pump - water - enjoy! Why should I use Miracle-Gro Organic Pump & Feed Food For All Plants? No mixing, no measuring, no mess. Just one simple pump of Miracle-Gro Organic Pump & Feed Food For All Plants will feed your plant for a week with glorious results, organically. Where can I use Miracle-Gro Organic Pump & Feed Food For All Plants? Small but mighty - use on any plant, indoor or outdoor, straight on the soil. For more sensitive plants like cacti or succulents only feed once every 2 weeks. When should I use Miracle-Gro Organic Pump & Feed Food For All Plants? Only feed when plants are actively growing. Small plants and herbs: 1 pump every week. Medium plants: 2 pumps every week. Large plants: 3 pumps every week. How do I use Miracle-Gro Organic Pump & Feed Food For All Plants? Shake the bottle before use. Pump the plant food directly into the soil, it should not touch the leaves of the plant at all. Then water, as normal. Wash hands after use. Keep out of the reach of children.
